'''Aken''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ferroan]] who flew a [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Sekotan]] ship to pick up the Solos from the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and take them to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot's]] surface.<ref name="TUF" />

{{Char-stub}}
